* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): QR-Systemtherapie-Fall1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table):

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-therapieart
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 169413002](http://snomed.info/id/169413002) (Hormone therapy (procedure))
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-intention
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 373808002](http://snomed.info/id/373808002) (Curative - procedure intent (qualifier value))
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-stellung
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 352241000119100](http://snomed.info/id/352241000119100) (Adjuvant chemotherapy (procedure))
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-protokoll
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Letrozol 2,5 mg 1x taeglich fuer 5-10 Jahre
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-substanz
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Letrozol 2,5 mg
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-beginn
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2025-04-25
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)syst-anmerkungen
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Aromatasehemmer postmenopausal, entsprechend Tumorboard-Empfehlung. Keine Chemotherapie aufgrund Oncotype DX RS 18.
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format
